description_long: This is a modern, two-seater recliner upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring broad, rectangular armrests and a thick, cushioned backrest. The seat and backrest are divided into two distinct, plush sections, providing individual comfort for each occupant. The armrests are wide and flat, offering ample support and a contemporary aesthetic. The back of the recliner is tall and straight, with a seamless, minimalist design that complements urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor plazas. The seat cushions are deep and well-padded, suggesting a comfortable sitting experience. No visible reclining mechanisms or footrests are present, giving the piece a clean and streamlined appearance.
description: A modern, beige two-seater recliner with wide, flat armrests and plush, segmented cushions. The design is minimalist and comfortable, suitable for urban public or semi-public spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, padded seat and backrest, as well as the broad, rectangular armrest.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tall, straight backrest and the seamless, continuous upholstery across the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and cushion structure seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the two distinct seat and backrest sections, wide armrests, and the inviting, plush seating area.
attribute_armrest_design: The armrests are wide, rectangular, and fully padded with the same beige fabric as the rest of the recliner, providing a solid and comfortable support surface.
attribute_backrest_segmentation: The backrest is divided into two vertical sections, each corresponding to a seat, with no additional segmentation for headrest or lumbar support.
